channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 73/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 73/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 67.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting accused of restarting ‘Brexit wars’ in Labour leadership row

item.title: i Politics: Streeting to double down on calls to rejoin EU - despite anger from 'Red Wall' MPs

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Where does UK-EU relationship stand and how might bid to rejoin bloc be received?
item.description: Where does UK-EU relationship stand and how might bid to rejoin bloc be received?

item.title: i Politics: The Burnham 'myth': Did King of the North really transform Manchester?
item.description: The Burnham 'myth': Did King of the North really transform Manchester?

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Sir Keir Starmer and Rachel Reeves's vibes ignore us to the fact that this a traditional Labour Government making the traditional mistakes and that traditionally leads to the Tories quickly replacing them. The opportu...
